name: Bubble Man Running Game
description: Bubble Man Running Gameis a thrilling mobile game that puts you in control of an unstoppable hero on a quest for supremacy. As you navigate through dynamic levels filled with obstacles, your goal is to gather points and recruit more fighters to your army. But watch out for the rebel king who stands in your way - use your skills to outmaneuver him and push him down while mastering the art of the clash. With fast-paced action and addictive gameplay, Bubble Man Running Gamee will keep you entertained for hours on end. Download now and become the ultimate champion!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
